scripts.docker:dev:clean-cache: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local exec admin-frontend rm -rf /app/apps/admin-frontend/.next && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local exec public-frontend rm -rf /app/apps/public-frontend/.next
scripts.docker:dev:caddy:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local stop caddy && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local rm -f caddy && docker volume rm -f cppms_caddy_data cppms_caddy_config && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local up -d caddy
scripts.docker:prod:caddy:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env stop caddy && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env rm -f caddy && docker volume rm -f cppms_caddy_data cppms_caddy_config && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env up -d caddy
scripts.seed:docker:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local --profile seed run --rm seed
scripts.seed:docker:dev:force: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml --env-file .env.local --profile seed run --rm -e SEED_ARGS=--force seed
scripts.seed:docker:prod: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env --profile seed run --rm seed
scripts.seed:docker:prod:force: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env --profile seed run --rm -e SEED_ARGS=--force seed
